steps.name: Regression test: pre-loaded staple has null stapleId
steps.criteria: Test starts a trip with library.listAll(), verifies trip items have non-null stapleId. Test MUST FAIL against current code.

steps.name: Fix: StapleInput type includes optional id
steps.criteria: trip.start() preserves staple IDs from library.listAll(). Pre-loaded trip items have stapleId set. Tapping staple in HomeView opens edit sheet.
